agentStop.bash: VALIDATOR="$HOME/.akr/templates/.akr/scripts/validate_documentation.py"; mkdir -p .akr/logs; if [ ! -f "$VALIDATOR" ]; then echo '{"summary": {"note": "validate_documentation.py not found - clone core-akr-templates to ~/.akr/templates"}}' | tee .akr/logs/last-validation.json; exit 0; fi; if [ ! -f modules.yaml ]; then echo '{"summary": {"note": "modules.yaml not found - skipping module-aware validation"}}' | tee .akr/logs/last-validation.json; exit 0; fi; CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=AM HEAD -- docs); if [ -n "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then CHANGED_FILES="$CHANGED_FILES" python "$VALIDATOR" --changed-files --output json --fail-on needs | tee .akr/logs/last-validation.json; else python "$VALIDATOR" --all docs/modules --output json --fail-on needs | tee .akr/logs/last-validation.json; fi
